descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG and gain 3 stacks of {Sin Mark}. After playing, shuffle this card to the top of the Draw Pile. On the {ordinal:3rd} play, {Exhaust} and allow the next command card to benefit from the {Atonement by Pain} effect.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG and gain 3 stacks of {Sin Mark}. After playing, shuffle this card into the top of the Draw Pile. On the {ordinal:3rd} play, {Exhaust} and make your next Command Card benefit from the {Atonement by Pain} effect, applying it 2 times.
